rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ALIZER BARTHOLOMEW TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Answer To Nonform Or Specially Prepared Interrogatories & For Atty'S Fee & Exp; P&A; Decl.
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Dennis Bartholomew's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories as to petitioners Richard Hennum, Robert Hennum, Susan Hennum, Sharon Hennum-Yore, Chester Gutowski Jr., and Connie Gutowski is granted. No opposition has been filed. Petitioners are ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $536.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. (610/BEC)
